assertions.title: Load valid CSV File A via file picker
assertions.reason: File A upload succeeded, loaded state rendered correctly, and response body now includes required file_name.

steps.expected: File A card shows filename, row/column count, and column pills
steps.observed: Card showed file_a.csv with 4 rows • 4 columns and typed column pills.

steps.expected: HTTP 200 with headers, row_count, columns, and file_name
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with body containing file_name="file_a.csv", headers, columns, and row_count=4.

assertions.title: Empty file is rejected gracefully
assertions.reason: 0-byte CSV is now rejected with a clean 400 and user-facing error, with no console exceptions.

steps.action: Upload /tmp/val-file-011-empty.csv as replacement for File A
steps.observed: Inline/banner error text displayed: 'CSV file is empty'.

assertions.title: Load pair order with unknown version fails
assertions.reason: Unknown pair-order version now returns the expected unsupported-version semantics.

steps.observed: UI error banner displayed 'Unsupported pair-order file version 3'.

assertions.title: Empty-filter vs empty-dataset panels
assertions.reason: Both message variants now render correctly for zero-total and non-empty/zero-filter states.

steps.action: Run compare on header-only vs header-only files (0 data rows)
steps.expected: Zero dataset message is 'No results match the selected filter'
steps.observed: Results view showed 'No results match the selected filter'.

steps.action: Run all-matches compare and switch to Mismatches filter
steps.expected: Non-empty dataset + zero active-filter rows shows 'No results match the current filter and search.'
steps.observed: Results view showed 'No results match the current filter and search.'.

evidence.network: Zero-dataset compare: POST /api/sessions/bd9a75f8-7484-49a8-9e12-f5f857b3dd7e/compare -> 200 summary totals all zero with results=[] (m6-frontend-dry/web-rerun-round2/VAL-RESULTS-017-network-empty-dataset.json)

assertions.title: All-matches comparison still usable
assertions.reason: All-matches run shows 100% match rate with zero non-match buckets and correct empty-filter messaging under Mismatches.

steps.expected: 100% match rate, zero other buckets, no ignored/duplicate banners
steps.observed: Summary showed 100% (4/4), Matches=4, all other buckets=0, and no ignored/duplicates info banners.

steps.expected: No-match panel says 'No results match the current filter and search.'
steps.observed: Panel text exactly matched 'No results match the current filter and search.'.

frictions.description: Hidden file inputs are regenerated after uploads/resets, so upload targets must be re-discovered per step in headless automation.
frictions.resolution: Re-exposed current input[type=file] elements before each upload and used fresh refs from snapshot output.

summary: Tested 5 rerun assertions: 5 passed (VAL-FILE-002, VAL-FILE-011, VAL-MAP-017, VAL-RESULTS-017, VAL-RESULTS-024).
